rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
rule_metadata.title: Fake PEM Certificate Written to Registry

rules.rule_text:
title: Fake PEM Certificate Written to Registry
id: e2ee1c85-642f-44ed-94f3-c45c8ada1e47
description: Some malware stores base64 payloads in the registry disguised as PEM
  certificates, so they can be decoded with certutil.exe. A valid PEM certificate
  should start with MII... Decode the base64 payload and/or investigate why this key
  was created.
status: test
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: 2024-08-19
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: registry_set
detection:
  selection_pem:
    Details|startswith: '-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----'
  filter_valid_pem:
    Details|contains|cased: MII
  condition: selection_pem and not filter_valid_pem
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
